title: fine line
content:
if the iraqi troops surrender during the war, they're doing the honorable thing. if the american troops do the same thing, they're called traitors.

... all depends on who draws the line.

 %(me)by the way, the massive strikes last night is part of the "a-day" phase. "a" representing "air strike" by the bush administration's point of view. however, "a" tends to represent "a--hole" in my point of view.%
